name: Anura Reporting API
description: Anura Reporting API for ad fraud detection analytics. Provides reporting on sessions, browsers, geography, networks, and more. All requests use HTTP POST. Date-specific requests are limited to a 7-day rolling time frame (31 days for Overview endpoints).
